name: Grung (OGA)
bonuses: Source: One Grung Above, Extra Life 2017
Grungs are aggressive froglike humanoids found in rain forests and tropical jungles. They are fiercely territorial and see themselves as superior to most other creatures.
Ability Score Increase.Your Dexterity score increases by 2 and your Constitution score increases by 1.
Age.Grungs mature to adulthood in a single year, but have been known to live up to 50 years.
Arboreal Alertness.You have proficiency in the Perception skill.
Size.Grungs stand between 2 ½ and 3 ½ feet tall and average about 30 pounds. Your size is Small.

traits.name: Grung society is a caste system
traits.summary: Each caste lays eggs in a separate hatching pool, and juvenile grungs join their caste upon emergence from the hatchery. All grungs are a dull greenish gray when they are born, but each individual takes on the color of its caste as it grows to adulthood. From lowest to highest caste, grungs can be green, blue, purple, red, orange, or gold.

traits.name: Age
traits.summary: Grungs mature to adulthood in a single year, but have been known to live up to 50 years.

traits.name: Alignment
traits.summary: Most grungs are lawful, having been raised in a strict caste system. They tend toward evil as well, coming from a culture where social advancement occurs rarely, and most often because another member of your army has died and there is no one else of that caste to fill the vacancy.

traits.name: Arboreal Alertness
traits.summary: You have proficiency in the Perception skill.

traits.name: Amphibious
traits.summary: You can breathe air and water.

traits.name: Poison Immunity
traits.summary: You are immune to poison damage and the poisoned condition.

stats.label: Ability Score Increase
stats.value: Your Dexterity score increases by 2 and your Constitution score increases by 1.

stats.label: Size
stats.value: Grungs stand between 2 ½ and 3 ½ feet tall and average about 30 pounds. Your size is Small.

stats.label: Speed
stats.value: You have a walking speed of 25 feet. Your sticky finger and toe pads give you a climb speed of 25 feet.

stats.label: Languages
stats.value: You can speak, read, and write Grung.
